result.stdout:
Usage: mr [command] [options]

Options
    --version, -v   Displays the version of the program.

Commands
    exec, x      Executes a command for each repository.
    project, p   Create and manage MultiRepo projects.
    repos, r     Manage repositories under the current project.
    tags, t      Manage tags under the current project.
    vcs, v       Version control system commands

commands.payload:
Usage: mr [command] [options]

Options
    --version, -v   Displays the version of the program.

Commands
    exec, x      Executes a command for each repository.
    project, p   Create and manage MultiRepo projects.
    repos, r     Manage repositories under the current project.
    tags, t      Manage tags under the current project.
    vcs, v       Version control system commands

result.stdout:
Usage: mr exec [argument] [options]

Arguments
    args   The command to execute.

Options
    --exclude-repo, --er   Do not operate on repositories having the names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --exclude-tags, --et   Operate on only repositories without these tags.
    --only-me, --me        Only operate on the repository of the current directory.
    --repo, --ir           Operate on only repositories have names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --tags, --it           Operate on only the repositories with these tags.

commands.payload:
Usage: mr exec [argument] [options]

Arguments

Options
    --exclude-repo, --er   Do not operate on repositories having the names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --exclude-tags, --et   Operate on only repositories without these tags.
    --only-me, --me        Only operate on the repository of the current directory.
    --repo, --ir           Operate on only repositories have names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --tags, --it           Operate on only the repositories with these tags.

result.stdout:
Usage: mr project [command] [option]

Commands
    clone      Clones a project to the local system.
    list, ls   Lists all project definitions under a project repository.
    root       Displays the root directory of the current project.

commands.payload:
Usage: mr project [command] [option]

Commands
    clone      Clones a project to the local system.
    list, ls   Lists all project definitions under a project repository.
    root       Displays the root directory of the current project.

result.stdout:
Usage: mr project clone [arguments] [options]

Arguments
    manifest repo url   The clone URL of the repository that contains the project manifest.
    root directory      The root directory of the project being cloned.

Options
    --branch, -b         The branch in the manifest repository to checkout. Defaults to the default branch.
    --manifest-dir, -m   The relative directory from the project root to clone the manifest repository to. Defaults to _project.
    --repo-dir           The directory in the manifest repository that contains the manifest file.

commands.payload:
Usage: mr project clone [arguments] [options]

Arguments
    manifest repo url   The clone URL of the repository that contains the project manifest.
    root directory      The root directory of the project being cloned.

Options
    --branch, -b         The branch in the manifest repository to checkout. Defaults to the default branch.
    --manifest-dir, -m   The relative directory from the project root to clone the manifest repository to. Defaults to _project.
    --repo-dir           The directory in the manifest repository that contains the manifest file.

result.stdout:
Usage: mr project list [argument] [options]

Arguments
    manifest repo url   The clone URL of the repository that contains the project manifest.

Options
    --show-content, -c   Displays the contents of the manifest file.

result.stdout:
Usage: mr vcs [command] [option]

Commands
    branches   Displays the branches and tracking details of each repository.
    clean      Cleans untracked and ignored files from the repository.
    commit     Commits repository changes and optionally pushes to the server.
    pull       Pulls latest updates from each repository.
    status     Displays the status for each repository.

commands.payload:
Usage: mr vcs [command] [option]

Commands
    branches   Displays the branches and tracking details of each repository.
    clean      Cleans untracked and ignored files from the repository.
    commit     Commits repository changes and optionally pushes to the server.
    pull       Pulls latest updates from each repository.
    status     Displays the status for each repository.

result.stdout:

    --repo, --ir           Operate on only repositories have names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --tags, --it           Operate on only the repositories with these tags.

result.stdout:
Usage: mr vcs commit [argument] [options]

Arguments
    message   The commit message.

Options
    --exclude-repo, --er   Do not operate on repositories having the names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --exclude-tags, --et   Operate on only repositories without these tags.
    --only-me, --me        Only operate on the repository of the current directory.
    --push                 Push the committed changes to the server.
    --repo, --ir           Operate on only repositories have names containing the specified case-insensitive string.
    --tags, --it           Operate on only the repositories with these tags.
